preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true

column.name: title
column.value: Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory

column.name: objective
column.value: Complete MNTD workflow from sample intake to archiving

column.name: protocol
column.value: Standard MNTD Laboratory Protocol

column.name: content
column.value: Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease Laboratory notebook template with workflow pages for sample intake, reception, verification, and processing.

delete.where: title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true

changeSet.author: openelis-mntd

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 1

changeSet.comment: Create Sample Intake / Sample Creation page for MNTD Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Sample Intake / Sample Creation

column.name: instructions
column.value: Capture all incoming samples as they arrive at reception. Import samples via CSV manifest with the following data points: Sample ID/Registration name, Sample source (Field/External organization), Project name, Sample Type (from dropdown), Collection site/location, Collection date and time, Collected by (person/organization), Number of samples. System will generate unique ID, barcode, and set status to 'Registered - Awaiting Reception'.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 1

changeSet.author: openelis-mntd

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 2

changeSet.comment: Create Laboratory Reception and Verification page for MNTD Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Laboratory Reception & Verification

column.name: instructions
column.value: Confirm physical receipt and validate sample quality. Use bulk value entry to verify samples. Record: Receipt Information (date/time, received by, condition on arrival), Verification (sample matches registration Yes/No, label verified Yes/No), Quality Assessment (QC result: Pass/Fail/Pass with remarks, QC remarks if applicable). If Fail: notify researcher and mark as Discarded or Proceed with remarks. If Pass: proceed to storage. System updates status to 'Received - QC Passed' or 'Received - QC Failed'.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 2

changeSet.author: openelis-mntd

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 3

changeSet.comment: Create Temporary Storage Assignment page for MNTD Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Temporary Storage Assignment

column.name: instructions
column.value: Track exact physical location using storage hierarchy. Select a storage location (Room, Freezer, Rack, Box), then click a well position to assign samples. Record: Storage Hierarchy (Room, Freezer/Device, Storage type - Raw/Processed, Rack, Box, Well/position), Environmental Monitoring (Freezer ID, Temperature check AM/PM, Temperature value, Checked by). Use temperature logging for compliance tracking. System updates status to 'Stored - Temporary Storage'.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 3

changeSet.author: openelis-mntd

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 4

changeSet.comment: Create Sample Processing Preparation page for MNTD Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Sample Processing Preparation

column.name: instructions
column.value: Prepare samples for laboratory processing. Select processing type (Aliquoting, DBS punching, Extraction, Culture), assign technician and processing date. Link reagents and instruments from inventory. Register any missed samples from field collection. Optionally record batch and lot numbers for traceability. System locks parent samples for processing and links reagents/instruments to the process.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 4

changeSet.author: openelis-mntd

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.workflow_page_template WHERE workflow_category = 'MNTD'

changeSet.comment: Insert predefined MNTD workflow page templates

column.name: name
column.value: Sample Intake / Sample Creation

column.name: description
column.value: Capture all incoming samples as they arrive at reception

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Import samples via CSV manifest. Capture: Sample ID, Sample source (Field/External), Project name, Sample Type (from dropdown), Collection site, Collection date/time, Collected by, Number of samples. System generates unique ID and barcode.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Sample Intake / Sample Creation - Bulk data entry for incoming MNTD samples

column.name: name
column.value: Laboratory Reception & Verification

column.name: description
column.value: Confirm physical receipt and validate sample quality

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Use bulk value entry to verify samples. Record receipt info (date/time, received by, condition), verification (matches registration, label verified), QC assessment (Pass/Fail/Pass with remarks). Update status accordingly.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Laboratory Reception & Verification - Batch verification of sample quality

column.name: name
column.value: Temporary Storage Assignment

column.name: description
column.value: Track exact physical location and temperature monitoring

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Select storage location (Room, Freezer, Rack, Box) and click well position to assign samples. Record storage type (Raw/Processed), assigned by, and date/time. Log temperature checks (AM/PM) for environmental compliance.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Temporary Storage Assignment - Location tracking and environmental monitoring

column.name: name
column.value: Sample Processing Preparation

column.name: description
column.value: Prepare samples for laboratory processing with reagent and instrument selection

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Select processing type (Aliquoting, DBS punching, Extraction, Culture), assign technician and date. Link reagents and instruments from inventory. Register missed samples from field. Record batch/lot numbers for traceability.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Sample Processing Preparation - Processing type selection and inventory linking
